EmailTemplate.description: Renewals email providing more information on IR35 Protect.
EmailTemplate.name: IR35 Protect Upsell (more information for renewals)
EmailTemplate.subject: Have you considered IR35 insurance?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Your business insurance is now up for renewal with Kingsbridge.
Have you considered adding IR35 Protect to your cover?
Our IR35 Protect cover protects your business from the potentially crippling costs that can follow an IR35 enquiry. They can include defence costs, taxes and interest — on top of any penalties payable to HMRC.
I’ve attached some information about our IR35 Protect cover in case you’d like to know more.
Or if you'd prefer to talk through it in more detail, or would like to get it added to your renewal quote, please give me a call on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
